claims.summary: Minime main wires stability safety nets and typed self-mirroring.
claims.claim: Minime identified `hard_reset`, adaptive target floors, recovery fill boost, semantic lane activity, semantic projection bias, stable-core semantic retirement, rescue-overfill, and `SpectralFingerprintV1` as the scaffolding that keeps the runtime settled and visible.

claims.summary: Overpacked mode-packing and hard-reset texture pressure are reviewable without live action.
claims.claim: Minime warned that stable-core trickle and overpacked mode-packing may smooth or suppress initiative; the source already exposes review-only texture/pressure surfaces that name those states without applying local control.

claims.summary: Pulsed semantic admission or porosity-threshold tuning is live-control authority.
claims.claim: Minime suggested moving from `stable_core_semantic_trickle` to pulsed admission and increasing porosity/mode-packing slack so shadow variance can express without being treated as instability.
evidence: authority: live semantic admission, pressure/porosity, fill, PI, or sensory-cadence behavior requires Mike/operator approval
